description: You are a robotics engineer preparing a Webots simulation for validating a remote monitoring system in an underground mine. Configure the 'MINING_ROBOT' by setting the 'radio_emitter' Emitter node's range to 500 and channel to 7, and the 'status_display' Display node's width to 320 and height to 240. Additionally, add a Fog node at the world root level with a visibilityRange of 50.0 and fogType set to "EXPONENTIAL" to simulate mine dust. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/mining_robot_configured.wbt.
